statement: In every magma, Equation 2399 (`x = (y * (z * (z * x))) * y`) implies Equation 1832 (`x = (x * (x * x)) * (x * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0140
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op z x))) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x (op x x)) (op x x))
